name: Polymesh.PolymeshCheckerFlags
summary: Polymesh check flags, please refer to PolymeshHealthCheckEnum for the corresponding result values.

enum_values.name: LoopVertexUnique
enum_values.summary: To check that no two consecutive vertex index may be the same.

enum_values.name: VerticesOnSameEdge
enum_values.summary: To check outerloop vertices on same edge, distance tolerance 0.01.

enum_values.name: OuterloopSelfIntersection
enum_values.summary: To check if outerloop intersects itself, EPSILON 1.E-4

enum_values.name: InnerloopSelfIntersection
enum_values.summary: To check if innerloop intersects itself, EPSILON 1.E-4.

enum_values.name: InnerloopInsideOuterloop
enum_values.summary: To check if innerloop inside outerloop, EPSILON 1.E-4.

enum_values.name: LoopNormalValidity
enum_values.summary: The inner loop is oriented clockwise, the opposite of the outer loop (counterclockwise).

enum_values.name: Multishellness
enum_values.summary: To check are there more than one topologically connected components in the polymesh. This checks only through vertex indexes.

enum_values.name: MultishellnessGeometrical
enum_values.summary: To check are there more than one geometrically connected components in the polymesh. Check with all vertex edge face position containment (includes partial edge touching cases). This check can be slow, the behavior is O(n^2).

enum_values.name: VerticesOnSamePosition
enum_values.summary: To check if there are any vertices that are in the same location, EPSILON 0.01.

enum_values.name: UnusedVertices
enum_values.summary: To check if there are any unused vertices in the vertex array.

enum_values.name: NonManifoldEdges
enum_values.summary: Are there non-manifold edges (indirect edge vertices are found for more than 2 faces).

enum_values.name: NullFaces
enum_values.summary: To check if all vertices of the face are linearly dependent, or having less than 3 vertices, or smaller than allowed edges.
